name: Insight Wide
description: Widescreen insight card for presentations — bold heading, body text, and optional background image on a 16:9 canvas.
author: slide-cli

slots.label: Heading
slots.description: Main insight heading. 2–10 words work best.

slots.label: Eyebrow label
slots.description: Small uppercase label above the heading (e.g. 'LESSON', 'INSIGHT', 'TIP').

slots.label: Background image
slots.description: Optional background image. Covers the full slide with a dark overlay so text stays legible. Local path or URL.

slots.label: Background color
slots.description: Slide background. Also used as the overlay tint when an image is present. Keep consistent across all slides.

slots.label: Text color
slots.description: Primary text color. Keep consistent across all slides in a deck.

slots.label: Accent color
slots.description: Accent color for eyebrow and rule. Vary per slide.
